title: 英國政府暗示可能與國際夥伴合作接收「香港難民」

replies.msg:
英國外相Dominic Raab指如果香港清況惡化, 可能與國際夥伴合作向香港人提供救生船(lifeboat) 方案.

(講得lifeboat, 通常係話會接收難民昶.)

https://twitter.com/lukedepulford/status/1267773510069497856

Luke de Pulford 裴倫德
@lukedepulford
BREAKING: @DominicRaab says he is looking at the possibility of international “lifeboat” scheme for Hong Kongers WITH INTERNATIONAL PARTNERS if things deteriorate.

This is the right approach. Sending a strong international signal from the international community.
7:02 PM · Jun 2, 2020
